elements.MAIN_EFFECT: {H} If you control another Animal, draw a card.
{H} I gain [[Fleeting]] unless there's an Animal in an opponent's Expedition.
I can't be played unless there's an Animal in an opponent's Expedition.  When I leave the Expedition zone — Create a [Woollyback 1/1/1] Animal token in my Expedition.
I can't be played unless there's another Character in each of your Expeditions.  When I leave the Expedition zone — Create a [Woollyback 1/1/1] Animal token in each of your Expeditions.
elements.ECHO_EFFECT: {D} : Create a [Woollyback 1/1/1] Animal token in target Expedition.

elements.MAIN_EFFECT: {J} Send to Reserve target Character with Base Cost {2} or less.  When you pass — If you control another Feat, complete me.

elements.ECHO_EFFECT: [[Completed]]: When you create a token Character — You may exhaust me to give it 1 boost.
